content:
Day 2: The Influence of Others on Our Thinking
📌 Instructions: Choose one of the prompts below to explore in depth.

🔹 Concrete Prompt:

Write about a person who influenced your education. What impact did they have?

🔹 Abstract Prompt:

What does it mean to think critically?

🔹 Connecting Prompt:

How has a meaningful conversation changed your perspective?

🔹 Exploratory Prompt:

If you had the chance to sit down and talk with any historical figure, who would it be and what would you want to learn from them?


Day 3: The Role of Memory in Writing
📌 Instructions: Choose one of the prompts below to explore in depth.

🔹 Concrete Prompt:

Describe a memory from childhood that still impacts you today. How would you structure it as a narrative?

🔹 Abstract Prompt:

Why do people tell stories? What purpose do they serve in personal and cultural contexts?
context: From document: Daily Journal Prompts | Weeks 1 - 6 | ENG 101 — chunk 2 (chunk 2/19)
